142700.name: Daily new confirmed cases due to COVID-19 (rolling 7-day average, right-aligned)

display.entityAnnotationsMap:
European Union: Some EU countries changed methodology. See country-by-country series.
Spain: Apr 19: methodology change & Apr 25: methodology change
Ecuador: May 8: methodology change
France: Jun 2: methodology change
Chile: Jun 18: earlier cases added
United Kingdom: Jul 3: methodology change & Oct 5: earlier cases added
Kyrgyzstan: Jul 18: methodology change
Luxembourg: Aug 28: methodology change

142700.s_name: European CDC – Situation Update Worldwide – Last updated 6 October, 10:06 (London time)

source.name: European CDC – Situation Update Worldwide – Last updated 6 October, 10:06 (London time)
source.dataPublishedBy: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC)
source.additionalInfo: Raw data on confirmed cases and deaths for all countries is sourced from the European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC). Our complete COVID-19 dataset is a collection of the COVID-19 data maintained by Our World in Data. It is updated daily and includes data on confirmed cases, deaths, and testing. We have created a new description of all our data sources. You find it at our GitHub repository here. There you can download all of our data.

142948.name: Daily new estimated infections of COVID-19 (YYG, mean)
142948.description: Values are for the mean estimate.

source.name: Youyang Gu, COVID-19 Estimates (2020)
source.additionalInfo: Data from Youyang Gu estimating the true number of COVID-19 infections for currently 71 countries. Estimates and countries covered are as of 3 October 2020. More details can be found at https://covid19-projections.com/.
